author: PC Gamer
text:
I’m waiting days between attempts to catch one fish in Final Fantasy 14 before it disappears for months, so don’t let anyone tell you raids are the ‘hardcore’ challenge
If you thought I was bad at dodging bright lines on the floor, wait until you've seen me fish.

author: PC Gamer
text:
A domain related to J-Pop idol phenomenon Love Live! went up for auction and the lead bid is a very sane $615 million
Love Live… Profit?!?

author: PC Gamer
text:
The Fortnite-Overwatch crossover means we're talking about Tracer's butt again
Because of course we are.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Videogame pirates tell other pirates to shut up about it after Subnautica 2 developers are taunted with illicit copies
A breach of pirate etiquette has even pirates siding with a Subnautica 2 designer.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Overwatch's lackluster 10th anniversary event will have its rewards improved next week, with more free stuff planned for later this year
Game director Aaron Keller acknowledged players' disappointment with the event on X.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Subnautica 2's early access roadmap promises quality-of-life additions, co-op improvements, and—eventually—new biomes and creatures
The ocean's got room for more.

author: PC Gamer
text:
We can thank a Jim Henson Company puppeteer for some of Valve's best animation work
TF2, Left 4 Dead, and Portal have some Fraggle Rock in them.

author: PC Gamer
text:
GamesRadar has decamped to Kyoto to bring you some killer world premieres and trailers straight out of BitSummit Punch 2026
We just came in and found a letter in Japanese on their desks. We assume this is what it says.

author: PC Gamer
text:
I'm tired of everything getting turned into a roguelite, but I'll make an exception for pinball
My weakness has been laser targeted.
